bio:
Offline social club for humans🦦 
Touch some grass 🌿🌀✨
Join the whatsapp community below ⬇️

gallery.caption:
For three beautiful hours, our café turned into a little art studio — brushes moving, coffees brewing, and smiles everywhere. Watching everyone create, laugh, and enjoy the moment was the best part of the day.
Thank you to everyone who joined the painting session and filled the space with such lovely energy. 💙  #CafeByTheBae #PaintingSession #SipAndPaint #CreativeEvening #RohtakCafe ArtAndCoffee

From strangers to a dance crew in just 2 hours. 🕺🏻❤️

What an incredible evening of dancing on Karan Aujla's Banger! ✨

A huge thank you to everyone who joined us and to @forevernky for an amazing workshop. Special thanks to @bhallajewellersrohtak for making Father’s Day even more special with thoughtful personalised gifts💛

Until the next Disconnect Experience… 👀✨

#Disconnectfr #danceworkshop #Rohtak #karanaujla #Boyfriend
